title: Model-to-API Endpoint Mapping
description: Maps AI model families to their supported API endpoints. Used to determine which endpoint (chat/completions vs responses vs messages) a model requires.

responses.description: Newer unified API for agentic, tool-using, and multimodal workflows. Required for GPT-5+ models; some older models (o1, o3, gpt-4o, gpt-4.1) support it alongside chat/completions.

chat_completions.description: Legacy conversational API. Being deprecated for newer models by end of 2026.

models.notes: Responses API only. Not accessible via /chat/completions.
Supports both endpoints. Includes gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.4-nano.
Supports both endpoints. Only gpt-5.3-chat-latest confirmed in OpenAPI spec; gpt-5.3-codex variants not present.
Supports both endpoints. Includes gpt-5.2-pro.
Responses API only (ResponsesOnlyModel).
Supports both endpoints for gpt-5.1, gpt-5.1-codex, gpt-5.1-mini.
Responses API only for gpt-5-codex and gpt-5-pro (ResponsesOnlyModel).
Supports both endpoints for gpt-5, gpt-5-mini, gpt-5-nano.
Responses API only (ResponsesOnlyModel).
Reasoning model. o4-mini supports both endpoints (ModelIdsShared).
Responses API only. o3-pro and o3-deep-research are in ResponsesModel but not ChatModel.
Reasoning model. o3, o3-mini support both endpoints. o3-pro/deep-research use responses only (covered by separate entry above).
Responses API only. o1-pro is in ResponsesModel but not ChatModel.
Reasoning model. o1, o1-mini, o1-preview support both endpoints. o1-pro uses responses only (covered by separate entry above).
Responses API only. Specialized model for computer use tasks.
Supports both endpoints. codex-mini-latest is in ChatModel.
Multimodal. Supports both endpoints.
Supports both endpoints. Includes gpt-4.1-mini, gpt-4.1-nano.
Preview model. Chat completions only.
Legacy. Chat completions only.
Legacy. Chat completions only.
Legacy. Chat completions only. Deprecated.

messages.description: Unified Messages API for all Claude models. Supports tool use, streaming, extended thinking, and vision.

models.notes: Latest flagship. 1M token context.
Invitation-only (Project Glasswing). Limited availability. 1M token context.
Best combination of speed and intelligence. 1M token context.
Includes claude-opus-4-8, claude-opus-4-7, claude-opus-4-6, claude-opus-4-5, claude-opus-4-1. 1M token context.
Includes claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-5. Production workhorse. 1M token context.
Includes claude-haiku-4-5. Fast/cheap. 200K token context.
Previous generation. 200K token context.
Previous generation fast model.
Previous generation. 200K token context.
